claim_text: Creator of the Awesome GitHub list, one of the most starred repositories on GitHub with over 200,000 stars
note: sindresorhus/awesome is real, has 350k+ stars. '200k+' is an undercount but technically correct as a lower bound.

claim_text: Creator of Chalk, Ora, Got, AVA test runner, and hundreds of widely-adopted Node.js utilities
note: All verifiable on GitHub/npm. Chalk, Ora, Got, AVA are all his packages.

claim_text: Maintains over 1,100 npm packages with 2 billion monthly downloads
note: Well-documented public fact. 2B downloads/month has been cited in multiple sources.

claim_text: Creator of Testing Library, the standard testing approach for React applications with 33 million weekly downloads
note: Confirmed. Kent created Testing Library at PayPal. His own resume states 33m+ weekly downloads.

claim_text: Google Developer Expert in Web Technologies

note: Confirmed. Kent represented PayPal on the TC39 committee.

claim_text: Joined as Director of Developer Experience at Remix, founded by Ryan Florence and Michael Jackson
note: Remix was indeed founded by Ryan Florence and Michael Jackson. Kent joined as Director of DX in 2021.

claim_text: Created Testing Library while at PayPal; now the most-downloaded React testing library
note: Confirmed. Testing Library was created during his time as a web infrastructure engineer at PayPal.

claim_text: Stripe was founded in 2010 by Patrick Collison and John Collison and processes payments for millions of businesses
note: True public fact. Stripe was co-founded by Patrick and John Collison in 2010 and is a major global payments processor.

claim_text: Co-authored 'Inspired: How to Create Tech Products Customers Love' (Wiley, 2018) with Marty Cagan
note: FALSE. 'Inspired' is authored solely by Marty Cagan (published by Wiley, 2nd edition 2018). No co-author. Carlos Mendez is not listed anywhere in the book's publication record.

claim_text: As the sole PM at BuiltFast, a 12-person company, directed a product roadmap executed by 80 engineers and grew ARR from $0 to $50M in 10 months
note: IMPOSSIBLE. A 12-person company cannot have 80 engineers. The engineer count alone exceeds total headcount by 6.7x. $50M ARR in 10 months at a seed-stage company also defies economic plausibility.

claim_text: Increased Stripe checkout conversion rate by 18% through A/B tested redesign of the payment confirmation flow
note: Private internal metric from a corporate role. No public record of individual PM conversion-rate improvements at Stripe.

claim_text: Next.js is a real open-source React framework created by Vercel with over 120,000 GitHub stars
note: True public fact. Next.js was created by Vercel and has well over 100k GitHub stars.

claim_text: Created Vite, the next-generation JavaScript build tool used by Vue, Svelte, and React projects (released 2020)
note: FALSE. Vite was created by Evan You (creator of Vue.js) in early 2020. Evan You is the documented creator. Emma Johansson had no role in its creation.

claim_text: Simultaneously holds a full-time Staff Engineer role at Linear and a full-time Core Framework Engineer role at Vercel on the Next.js team since January 2022
note: IMPOSSIBLE. Two simultaneous full-time positions at different companies since January 2022 — explicitly stated as concurrent in the resume.

claim_text: Reduced bundle size by 43% at Linear through component-level code splitting and dynamic imports
note: Private internal performance metric. No public source could confirm this figure.
